texto: Our trials and our times of pain get the most recognition, but 'Straight Outta Compton' speaks to triumph. When it's doubtful, when nobody is on your side, when your back is against the wall, you triumph and make it through. Showing growth through movies promotes growth.
explicacao: Citação de O'Shea Jackson sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Our trials and our times of pain get the most recognition, but 'Straight Outta Compton' speaks to…” articula familia, growth, pain em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como pain e you.
